mapper.select:
SELECT partyId, themeImg, themeName, themeDate, themeTime, partyName, avgAge, avgTemp, memberCount, status FROM ( SELECT A.PARTY_ID AS partyId ,D.ROOM_IMG AS themeImg, D.ROOM_NAME AS themeName , TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS themeDate, TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS themeTime , A.PARTY_NAME AS partyName, E.AGE AS avgAge, E.TEMP AS avgTemp, E.COUNT AS memberCount , FN_GET_PARTY_CONDITION(A.PARTY_ID) AS STATUS FROM PARTY A JOIN PARTY_ROOM B ON A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN C ON B.RES_OPEN_ID = C.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM D ON C.ROOM_ID = D.ROOM_ID JOIN ( SELECT PARTY_ID,TRUNC(NVL(AVG(AGE),-1),1) AS AGE, TRUNC(NVL(AVG(TEMP),-1),1) AS TEMP, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM VW_PARTY_ACTIVE_MEMBER GROUP BY PARTY_ID ) E ON A.PARTY_ID = E.PARTY_ID ) T
AND themeDate > SYSDATE + 1 AND STATUS = 'open'
AND partyId < #{lastId}
ORDER BY partyId DESC FETCH FIRST 2 ROWS ONLY

SELECT A.PARTY_ID AS partyId, A.PARTY_NAME AS partyName , E.CAFE_NAME AS cafeName, D.ROOM_NAME AS themeName , TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS themeDate , TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS themeTime , D.MIN_PLAYERS AS minPlayers, D.MAX_PLAYERS AS maxPlayers , D.PRICE AS Price, FN_RESERVATION_CHECK(C.RES_OPEN_ID) AS slotStatus , A.GENDER_ID AS genderId , F.GENDER_NAME AS genderName, A.MESSAGE AS partyComment , FN_GET_PARTY_CONDITION(A.PARTY_ID) AS partyStatus FROM PARTY A JOIN PARTY_ROOM B ON A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN C ON B.RES_OPEN_ID = C.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM D ON C.ROOM_ID = D.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE E ON D.CAFE_ID = E.CAFE_ID JOIN GENDER_CONDITION F ON F.GENDER_ID = A.GENDER_ID WHERE A.PARTY_ID = #{partyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PARTY_APPLY(APPLY_ID, PARTY_ID, USER_ID,APPLY_MESSAGE, CREATED_AT) VALUES(PARTY_APPLY_SEQ.NEXTVAL,#{partyId},#{userId},#{applyComment},SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT A.RES_OPEN_ID AS slotId, C.CAFE_NAME AS cafeName, B.ROOM_NAME AS themeName, B.ROOM_ID AS themeId , TO_CHAR(A.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resDate, TO_CHAR(A.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS resTime , B.MIN_PLAYERS AS minPlayers, B.MAX_PLAYERS AS maxPlayers, B.PRICE AS price, FN_RESERVATION_CHECK(A.RES_OPEN_ID) AS status FROM RES_OPEN A JOIN ROOM B ON A.ROOM_ID = B.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE C On B.CAFE_ID = C.CAFE_ID WHERE A.RES_OPEN_ID = #{slotId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT PARTY_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PARTY (PARTY_ID,USER_ID,PARTY_NAME,GENDER_ID,MESSAGE,CREATED_AT) VALUES(#{partyId},#{userId},#{partyName},#{genderCondition},#{partyComment},SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT A.MESSAGE_ID AS commentId,A.PARTY_ID, B.NICKNAME AS nickName, A.CONTENT AS partyComment, A.USER_ID AS userId, TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT,'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM PARTY_MESSAGE A JOIN USER_ACCOUNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.PARTY_ID = #{partyId} AND A.MESSAGE_ID > #{lastCommentId} ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT

SELECT A.DELETE_ID AS deleteId, A.MESSAGE_ID as commentId FROM MESSAGE_DELETE A JOIN PARTY_MESSAGE B ON A.MESSAGE_ID = B.MESSAGE_ID WHERE B.PARTY_ID = #{partyId} AND A.DELETE_ID > #{lastDeleteCommentId}

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS crewId,USER_ID AS userId , NICKNAME AS nickName, AGE AS age, GENDER AS gender , TEMP AS temp, READY AS ready, POSITION AS position ,APPLY_ID AS applyId FROM VW_PARTY_ACTIVE_MEMBER WHERE PARTY_ID = #{partyId} ORDER BY JOINDT

SELECT A.APPLY_ID AS applyId, B.NICKNAME AS nickName , C.GENDER AS gender,FN_GET_USER_AGE(C.BIRTHDATE) AS age ,FN_GET_MANNER(A.USER_ID) AS temp, A.APPLY_MESSAGE AS applyComment , A.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, A.PARTY_ID as partyId FROM PARTY_APPLY A JOIN USER_ACCOUNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN USER_INFO C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PARTY_MEMBER D WHERE D.APPLY_ID = A.APPLY_ID ) AND A.PARTY_ID = #{partyId} ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC
